segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: What evidence is there of a ghost?

translations.zh-Hans: 有什么证据表明那里有鬼？

segments.text: A public house which was recently bought by Mr.

translations.zh-Hans: 汤普森先生最近买下的一家

segments.text: Thompson is going to sell it because it is haunted.

translations.zh-Hans: 准备卖掉它，因为那里闹鬼。

segments.text: He told me that he could not go to sleep one night because he heard a strange noise coming from the bar.

translations.zh-Hans: 他告诉我，有天夜里他无法入睡，因为听到酒吧间里传来一种奇怪的声音。

segments.text: The next morning he found that the doors had been blocked by chairs and the furniture had been moved.

translations.zh-Hans: 第二天早晨，他发现门被椅子堵住了，家具也被移动过。

segments.text: Thompson had turned the lights off before he went to bed, they were on in the morning.

translations.zh-Hans: 睡前关了灯，但早晨灯却亮着。

segments.text: He also said that he had found five empty whiskey bottles which the ghost must have drunk the night before.

translations.zh-Hans: 他还说自己发现了五只空威士忌酒瓶，想必是鬼前一晚喝空的。

segments.text: When I suggested that some villagers must have come in for a free drink, Mr.

translations.zh-Hans: 我提出也许是几个村民进来白喝了一顿时，汤普森先生

segments.text: The villagers have told him that they will not accept the pub even if he gives it away.

translations.zh-Hans: 村民们告诉他，即使他把酒馆白送给他们，他们也不会要。
